title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Practo Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
